mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE place_id = #{value} AND status = 'DISPLAY'

SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating -- 리뷰가 없으면 0으로 처리 FROM place p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' -- 노출 가능한 리뷰만 집계 WHERE p.place_id = #{value} AND p.place_type = 'REST' -- 맛집 상세 전용 조회 GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite ( favorite_id, user_id, place_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_FAVORITE.NEXTVAL, -- 시퀀스를 사용해 PK 생성 #{userId}, #{placeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE place_id = #{value} AND status = 'DISPLAY'

SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating -- 리뷰가 없으면 0으로 처리 FROM place p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' -- 노출 가능한 리뷰만 집계 WHERE p.place_id = #{value} AND p.place_type = 'REST' -- 맛집 상세 전용 조회 GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite ( favorite_id, user_id, place_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_FAVORITE.NEXTVAL, -- 시퀀스를 사용해 PK 생성 #{userId}, #{placeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET view_count = NVL(view_count, 0) + 1 -- null 방지를 위해 NVL 사용 WHERE place_id = #{value} AND place_type = 'REST'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.place_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at AS reviewDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.created_at DESC) AS rn -- 최신 리뷰 우선 정렬 FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= (#{offset} + #{limit}) -- offset 이후 limit 개수만큼 조회

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate,
rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1) AS description, -- CLOB 컬럼을 JSP에서 사용 가능한 길이로 잘라서 조회 rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status AS restaurant_status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode,
COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p2 JOIN restaurant rt2 ON p2.place_id = rt2.restaurant_id WHERE p2.place_type = 'REST' AND rt2.status = 'OPEN'
AND p2.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND rt2.category = #{category}
AND p2.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY ) < 10 THEN INTERVAL '60' DAY ELSE INTERVAL '30' DAY END THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, -- 최근 등록된 맛집 수가 적으면 60일, 충분하면 30일 기준으로 최신 맛집을 우선 노출 NVL(p.view_count, 0) DESC, -- 최신 조건이 같으면 조회수 높은 순 p.place_id DESC -- 마지막 동점 정렬 기준 ) AS rn
FROM place p JOIN restaurant rt ON p.place_id = rt.restaurant_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_type = 'REST' AND rt.status = 'OPEN' -- 영업 중인 맛집만 랭킹 대상
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND rt.category = #{category}
GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1), rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode ) WHERE rn > #{start} AND rn <= #{end} -- start 초과 ~ end 이하 구간만 조회
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{value} AND r.status = 'DISPLAY'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate,
rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1) AS description, rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status AS restaurant_status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode,
COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p2 JOIN restaurant rt2 ON p2.place_id = rt2.restaurant_id WHERE p2.place_type = 'REST' AND rt2.status = 'OPEN'
AND p2.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND rt2.category = #{category}
AND p2.created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY ) < 10 THEN INTERVAL '60' DAY ELSE INTERVAL '30' DAY END THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, NVL(p.view_count, 0) DESC, p.place_id DESC ) AS rn
FROM place p JOIN restaurant rt ON p.place_id = rt.restaurant_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_type = 'REST' AND rt.status = 'OPEN'
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND rt.category = #{category}
GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1), rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode ) WHERE rn <= 5

SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate,
rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1) AS description, rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status AS restaurant_status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode,
COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating FROM place p JOIN restaurant rt ON p.place_id = rt.restaurant_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_id = #{value} AND p.place_type = 'REST' GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at,
rt.restaurant_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(rt.description, 4000, 1), rt.phone, rt.category, rt.status, rt.restdate, rt.areacode
